title: Breakwave Weekend Read 4Cn8N Wg9Gj
summary:
Main
As we conclude the workweek and head into the weekend, take a moment to review the key articles from this week, including those you've highlighted. New entrants on the TMX trade support Aframax employment , Sale and purchase activity , Made in America , The Big Picture: Sanctions , and more. Bottom is In; Trajectory of Recovery Depends on the Atlantic - We believe the significant correction in spot Capesize ratesthat pushed the Index down some 50% in a month's time is now over .
